text:
Attack on Titan 3 out this winter, new details and trailer

Koei Tecmo and Omega Force provided an update on Attack on Titan 3, revealing new details and the latest trailer. As part of this, we have confirmation that the game is launching on Nintendo Switch 2 this winter. Although nothing is confirmed just yet, it’s looking likely that Nintendo will be releasing Metroid Ravenous on Switch 2 at some point. However, that may not be the only Metroid project in development. VGC writer Andy Robinson put out a bit of a cryptic teaser on social media today. author: Nintendo Everything
text:
Nintendo shows no signs of following PlayStation’s physical media death even though Switch 2 and Switch rumored to have much higher production costs

Earlier today, Sony announced that it will discontinue physical releases for PlayStation 4 and PlayStation 5, which has reignited concerns about the future of physical media across the gaming industry. Unsurprisingly, many fans have begun asking whether Nintendo could eventually make a similar move. At the moment, however, the company’s strategy appears to point in the opposite direction. While game-key...

The post Nintendo shows no signs of following PlayStation’s physical media death even though Switch 2 and Switch rumored to have much higher production costs appeared first on Nintendo Everything.

text:
Rumor: Metroid Ravenous leaked for Nintendo Switch 2

Metroid Ravenous has apparently been leaked for Nintendo Switch 2. A listing for the game supposedly surfaced within Brazil’s Ministry of Justice and Public Security system. The page has already been removed, but not before a screenshot was taken. Here’s a snapshot of the classification: The listing doesn’t provide any specific details about the game. author: Nintendo Everything
text:
Dungeon Antiqua announced for Nintendo Switch

Amata Games, together with developer Shiromofu Factory, has announced that its new dungeon-crawling RPG Shiromofu Factory is heading to Nintendo Switch on July 30. Featuring retro-inspired pixel art, Dungeon Antiqua pays homage to classic RPGs from the ’80s and ’90s. The game draws inspiration from series like Wizardry and Final Fantasy, with players exploring sprawling dungeons, strengthening their party, and...

The post Dungeon Antiqua announced for Nintendo Switch appeared first on Nintendo Everything.

author: Nintendo Everything
text:
Outbound update 1.1 out now, patch notes – fishing and more

Outbound, the cozy adventure game that recently launched on Nintendo Switch, has just received a major free update. Alongside a wide range of bug fixes and gameplay improvements, the patch introduces an all-new fishing system. Dubbed The Fishing Update, this free expansion adds a relaxing fishing ecosystem to the game. Players can now craft different tiers of fishing rods, catch...

The post Outbound update 1.1 out now, patch notes – fishing and more appeared first on Nintendo Everything.

text:
Video: European eShop highlights – June 2026

Nintendo released a new video today showcasing a few European digital game highlights from June 2026. Some of the highlighted titles include Star Fox, Xenoblade Chronicles: Definitive Edition – Nintendo Switch 2 Edition, and Final Fantasy 7 Rebirth. Here’s the new video: June 2026 Highlights Video Keep track of Nintendo’s digital releases in our hub here.

text:
Nintendo explains approach to employee salaries, reports of 10% base bump are inaccurate

Shuntaro Furukawa, the global president of Nintendo, has commented on the company’s approach to employee salaries. The information comes from Nintendo’s most recent shareholders meeting held a few days ago. Initial reports indicated that base salaries had been raised by 10 percent, but we now have confirmation that this is inaccurate. The confusion came about due the initial summary of...
